text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of summer camp. It's a
period of intense training where racers can
improve their skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few months have passed since the Yayoi Sho,
yet Silence Suzuka still seems unable to shake her
doubts.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: This summer... I have to get faster...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (But my legs are feeling heavier and heavier.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, summer camp with Silence Suzuka begins.
